title: Define vault schema foundation and canonical file layout
acceptance_criteria: Shared vs private vault boundaries are explicit and source-of-truth rules are documented
Canonical file layout covers workspaces, projects, boards, columns, tasks, agents, approvals, audit, threads, and user overlays
Task, agent, approval, and audit frontmatter fields are defined for validation
Schema versioning and file ownership rules are clear
completion_summary: Defined canonical vault layout and frontmatter validators for shared, private, and system vault records
